docker run --rm --privileged --net host -v /dev/bus/usb:/dev/bus/usb -v /run/udev:/run/udev:ro -v /run/rpcbind.sock:/run/rpcbind.sock -v <WORKDIR>/Linux_for_Tegra:<WORKDIR>/Linux_for_Tegra -v <REPO>/share/entrypoint.sh:/jr-entrypoint.sh:ro -e JR_LINUX_FOR_TEGRA=<WORKDIR>/Linux_for_Tegra -e USER=root --entrypoint /jr-entrypoint.sh nvcr.io/nvidia/jetson-linux-flash-x86:r36.4 jetson-orin-nano-devkit nvme
